results.title: Cornerback Bryce Williams with Nebraska assistant coach Addison Williams.
results.description: Addison Williams and the Huskers beat out numerous big-name programs in landing Bryce Williams and Jailen Hill.

results.title: John Longmire makes major call on AFL coaching future after ‘serious’ interest in Tassie job
results.description: Sydney premiership coach John Longmire won’t be pursuing the Essendon and Carlton roles after he didn’t get the Tasmania gig.
